name: claude-notifications
description: All-in-one Claude Code notifications — sound alerts, OS notifications, and terminal focus. One-click setup, zero external dependencies.

commands.title: Claude Notifications: Set Up Claude Code Hooks
Claude Notifications: Remove Claude Code Hooks
Claude Notifications: Add Signal Files to Global Gitignore
Claude Notifications: Set Up macOS terminal-notifier (Recommended)

claudeNotifications.autoSetupHooks.description: Prompt to upgrade legacy shell-script hooks on activation

claudeNotifications.events.waiting.description: What happens when Claude needs your response (Notification + PermissionRequest events)

claudeNotifications.events.completed.description: What happens when Claude finishes a task (Stop event)

claudeNotifications.sounds.waiting.markdownDescription: Sound when Claude needs your response. Values: `bundled:notification`, `bundled:task-complete`, `system:<name>` (e.g. `system:Glass`), `custom` (uses path below), or `none`. Run **Claude Notifications: Choose Sound** to browse.

claudeNotifications.sounds.waitingPath.description: Path to custom sound file (when sounds.waiting is 'custom')

claudeNotifications.sounds.completed.markdownDescription: Sound when Claude finishes a task. Same values as `sounds.waiting`.

claudeNotifications.sounds.completedPath.description: Path to custom sound file (when sounds.completed is 'custom')

claudeNotifications.soundWhenFocused.description: What to do when you're already on the correct terminal. 'sound' plays an audio cue, 'nothing' stays silent.

claudeNotifications.macOS.setup.markdownDescription: macOS banners need `terminal-notifier` for click-to-open. [Run setup (Recommended)](command:claudeNotifications.setupMacNotifier)
